title: Invoice per E-Mail
excerpt: The Accountants and I would appreciate it if Monday.com could send the Invoices and Refunds via E-Mail with PDF so you don’t get an E-Mail-Notification to go to an Easter egg hunt on the Monday.com website to download yo…

posts.author: Huskydog (F)
posts.cookedHtml: The Accountants and I would appreciate it if Monday.com could send the Invoices and Refunds via E-Mail with PDF so you don’t get an E-Mail-Notification to go to an Easter egg hunt on the Monday.com website to download your Invoice which is mentioned in the E-Mail. Especially, the Invoices for the Integrations are difficult to find. All other companies also send their invoices by E-Mail, and the accountants and I like to spend our time differently.

posts.author: grimlockgizmo (Elizabeth)
posts.cookedHtml:
100% upvote for this.

The most frustrating email I get from Monday.com, telling me we’ve renewed, and now I have to wait 24 hours to get the invoice for accounts.

  1. It’s a waste of an email. Digital waste costs carbon.
  2. It’s a waste of my time reading it.
  3. It’s typically a waste of my time, as every month I go to the Monday admin treasure hunt to get the invoice (as I always seem to miss the link in the email since it’s missable), forget I have to wait 24hrs, and come back.
  4. Then there is having to go to the admin in the first place to get an invoice that could be attached to the email.
  5. Let’s not forget then putting an email together to the card receipt service to submit the invoice for our accountants.

All of which could be improved by simply sending the admin user of Monday.com an email with the invoice attached that can be forwarded (which I can set up to do automatically with inbox rules). Eliminating all the steps above.

Request:
Send us the invoice/card receipts by email as an attachment PDF.

posts.author: littlemisss74 (Stef)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please, I find it ridiculous that Monday, software designed to make like easier, and has the ability to automate work, asks you to click a link 24 hours later to get an invoice. All other subscription services I use email a pdf invoice every month. Come on Monday!

posts.author: littlemisss74 (Stef)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% agree, no idea why Monday dont email invoices as PDFs

posts.author: grimlockgizmo (Elizabeth)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m glad you replied, as it’s reminded me that I didn’t actual go back and download the invoice for the accountants!

posts.author: Ralf_Belden (Ralf Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml: This really has not bothered anybody else? An automation platform that cannot automatically send the bills to the customer? Or is there an automation available for this that I just have not found yet?

posts.author: grimlockgizmo (Elizabeth)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve not found any solution yet other than having to set a reminder to check for the download the next day. It’s such a frustrating process!

posts.author: leigh (Leigh Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Upvoted!
As others have observed, Monday is built on automation and time saving. This just seems so backward when I am tasked, as a business owner, by my financial dept, to log in and download a monthly invoice PDF, it is a real waste of precious time. Please get this on the next software update schedule! Thanks.
